articles.headline: Apple raises prices on MacBook and iPad amid rising chip costs driven by AI boom
articles.summary: Apple has increased prices on key products like the MacBook and iPad, citing rising costs for memory and storage chips fueled by the AI infrastructure rush. This signals a potential increase in operational costs for businesses investing in hardware and highlights supply chain pressures affecting the broader tech market.

articles.headline: Ionic Digital files for Nasdaq direct listing as AI miner and infrastructure firm
articles.summary: Bitcoin miner and AI infrastructure firm Ionic Digital has filed for a direct listing on Nasdaq, marking a significant move for companies leveraging AI in high-performance computing. This could reshape investment strategies for firms in the energy and data center sectors, particularly those evaluating AI-driven hardware demand.

articles.headline: Uber and Waymo end self-driving partnership in Phoenix ahead of new AI vehicle collaboration
articles.summary: Uber and Alphabet's Waymo have terminated their self-driving partnership in Phoenix, Arizona, as Uber prepares to launch a new autonomous vehicle collaboration using AI. This shift may impact business planning for ride-hailing companies and logistics firms evaluating AI automation in transportation.
